svg.title: World Model Canvas — W = M E Sigma S T C O V H A
svg.desc: Enterprise World Model Canvas in three layers: World Definition, World Dynamics, World Operation. Commerce refund example.
svg.text: W = ⟨M, E, Σ, S, T, C, O, V, H, A⟩
W₀ = ⟨E, S, T, C⟩ — ESTC minimal skeleton
World Operation — O, V, H, A
